summary: Sprint 2 Fase A: Multi-Tenant Reale (Fondamenta) Testing Complete. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Verified: 1) Health check returns 200, 2) All admin tenant API routes return 401 without auth (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE), 3) Tenant service CRUD functions work correctly (create_tenant, get_tenant, list_tenants, update_tenant, deactivate_tenant), 4) ensure_tenant_for_user auto-creates tenant for admin users with tenant_id='default', 5) ensure_tenant_for_user does NOT create tenant for non-admin users, 6) Tenant counters return sequential numbers (NF-2026-000001, NF-2026-000002), 7) Counters are isolated per tenant_id (different tenants get independent sequences), 8) Counter documents include tenant_id, counter_type, year metadata, 9) MongoDB indexes exist (tenants.uq_tenant, tenant_counters.uq_tenant_counter, tenant_counters.idx_tenant_counter_tid), 10) security.py create_session calls ensure_tenant_for_user for admin users.
critical_code_review_comments: Tenant service CRUD correctly implements all operations with proper field handling
Plan limits correctly applied: pilot (3 users, 50 commesse), pro (10 users, 500 commesse), enterprise (unlimited/-1)
update_tenant correctly updates plan-based limits when piano changes
ensure_tenant_for_user correctly checks role='admin' before auto-creating tenant
Tenant counters use atomic find_one_and_update for concurrency safety
Counter isolation verified: tenant A and B get independent sequences starting at 000001
MongoDB indexes correctly created: uq_tenant (unique), uq_tenant_counter (unique), idx_tenant_counter_tid
security.py create_session correctly imports and calls ensure_tenant_for_user for admin users with default tenant
seed_data_creation: Test users and tenants created during tests and cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 2 Fase A Multi-Tenant Reale verified. Key test data patterns: user_id='user_test_{uuid}', tenant_id='ten_{uuid}'. All tenant CRUD operations work correctly. Counter isolation verified between tenants. MongoDB indexes for tenants and tenant_counters exist and are unique. security.py auto-onboarding for admin users verified.

TestTenantServiceImports.test_tenant_service_imports: PASS - All CRUD functions import correctly
TestTenantServiceImports.test_piani_disponibili_limits: PASS - Plan limits correct (pilot: 3/50, pro: 10/500, enterprise: -1/-1)

TestTenantCountersImports.test_tenant_counters_imports: PASS - All counter functions import correctly

TestSecurityAutoOnboarding.test_create_session_calls_ensure_tenant_: PASS - create_session calls ensure_tenant_for_user for admin users

test_all_async_tenant_operations.create_tenant_with_correct_fields: PASS - Creates tenant with tenant_id, nome_azienda, piano, max_utenti, max_commesse, etc.
test_all_async_tenant_operations.list_tenants_returns_active_with_counts: PASS - Returns active tenants with utenti_count and commesse_count
test_all_async_tenant_operations.update_tenant_updates_fields_and_plan_li: PASS - Updates fields and plan-based limits correctly
test_all_async_tenant_operations.ensure_tenant_for_user_auto_creates_for_: PASS - Auto-creates tenant for admin users with tenant_id='default'
test_all_async_tenant_operations.ensure_tenant_for_user_does_not_create_f: PASS - Does NOT create tenant for non-admin users
test_all_async_tenant_operations.counters_isolated_per_tenant: PASS - Tenant A and B get independent sequences
test_all_async_tenant_operations.counter_document_includes_metadata: PASS - Document includes tenant_id, counter_type, year
test_all_async_tenant_operations.tenants_uq_tenant_index_exists: PASS - Index exists and is unique
test_all_async_tenant_operations.tenant_counters_uq_tenant_counter_index_: PASS - Index exists and is unique

verified_features.tenant_crud: VERIFIED - create_tenant, get_tenant, list_tenants, update_tenant, deactivate_tenant all work correctly
verified_features.auto_onboarding: VERIFIED - ensure_tenant_for_user auto-creates tenant for admin users with default tenant
verified_features.counter_sequential: VERIFIED - get_next_counter returns sequential numbers (NF-2026-000001, NF-2026-000002)
verified_features.counter_isolation: VERIFIED - Different tenants get independent counter sequences
verified_features.counter_metadata: VERIFIED - Counter documents include tenant_id, counter_type, year
verified_features.security_auto_onboarding: VERIFIED - create_session calls ensure_tenant_for_user for admin users
verified_features.api_auth_protection: VERIFIED - All admin tenant API routes return 401 without auth
